title: Insomnia Environment
description: An Insomnia environment stores key-value pairs of variables that can be referenced in requests using template tags. Environments allow switching between different configurations such as development, staging, and production without modifying individual requests.

_id.description: Unique identifier for the environment, typically prefixed with env_.

name.description: Human-readable name of the environment (e.g., Development, Staging, Production).

data.description: Key-value pairs of environment variables available for template tag substitution in requests.

additionalProperties.description: Environment variable value, which can be a string, number, boolean, object, or array.

dataPropertyOrder.description: Defines the display order of data properties in the UI.

color.description: Optional color code for visual identification of the environment in the UI.

parentId.description: Identifier of the parent workspace or base environment.

metaSortKey.description: Sort key used for ordering environments in the UI.

isPrivate.description: Whether the environment is private and excluded from cloud sync and Git storage. Useful for storing secrets locally.

created.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the environment was created.

modified.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the environment was last modified.
